components.text: Found near dry, scorched earth. Warm after picking. Looks nearly identical to Snow Ginseng — I have mixed them up. Store separately. Used in essence gathering and the highest-tier cleansing formulas. Combined with Snow Ginseng it forces a deeper reaction in marrow work.

Grows wild in savanna and badlands biomes. Also found in desert pyramids and bastion chests.

Can be grown as a crop.
